chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.S- 529 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.08.2019. Mr. Mansoor Ali Khan, Advocate for petitioner. Miss Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. for the State. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G. alongwith SIP Tharo Khan SHO Hala and Inspector Ghulam Hussain SHO Saeedabad. = Mr. Kashif Hussain Lakho, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondents No.4 to 6, taken on record. Learned Additional A.G. has filed comments on behalf of respondents No.1, 2 and 3 alongwith annexures showing that alleged detainee has appeared multiple times before this court and before the civil court and also recorded her statement affirming her marriage with Arbab Ali and so much so in a C.P.No.D-104 of 2018 filed by her before this court & she has reiterated the same facts. Confronted with such a situation, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition which is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE Tufail/PA
